name_en: Classic Lady patent leather Diana bag, a must-have three-compartment mini bag😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence💃🏻, crossbody or handheld, very feminine, classic and stylish style. A beauty bag that many fashion icons have, don't miss it❤️
